meta.title: LTS | Integrated Technical Services
meta.description: Integrated technical services: CCTV Surveillance & Security, Electrical Installations, and Networking & Connectivity throughout the Levante Region, Costa Cálida, Costa Blanca and surrounding areas, and Costa del Sol and surrounding areas.

values.subtitle:
Everything in one place
for your peace of mind.
values.subtitlePlain: Everything in one place for your peace of mind.

meta.title: LTS | Technical Services
meta.description: Professional technical services by Levante Technical Solutions: CCTV Surveillance & Security, Electrical Installations, Networking & Connectivity.

hero.title: Technical solutions for every need.
hero.subtitle: At Levante Technical Solutions we bring together different technical disciplines under one working philosophy: quality, reliability and solutions designed to last.

intro.title: Three areas of expertise. One commitment.
intro.text: Every project is different. That's why we analyse every requirement to deliver tailored technical solutions, combining experience, technology and personalised support from the first contact through to project completion.

surveillance.title: CCTV Surveillance & Security
surveillance.homeDescription: CCTV solutions for businesses, residential communities and homes, designed to provide security, control and peace of mind through reliable technology and remote access.
surveillance.description: We design and install CCTV solutions tailored to homes, residential communities and businesses, prioritising security, reliability and remote access from anywhere.
items: Installation of IP cameras and CCTV systems.
NVR and DVR recording systems.
Integration with existing network infrastructures.
Real-time remote monitoring.
Secure video recording and storage.
Solutions for businesses, commercial premises and homes.
Tailored advice based on your specific requirements.
Preventive and corrective maintenance.
surveillance.footer: Protecting what matters most, 24 hours a day.

electricity.title: Electrical Installations
electricity.homeDescription: Electrical installations, maintenance and fault diagnosis carried out with a strong focus on safety, energy efficiency and professional quality for businesses, residential communities and homes.
electricity.description: We carry out electrical installations, upgrades, maintenance and fault diagnosis, ensuring safety, energy efficiency and full compliance with current regulations.
items: Residential, commercial and industrial electrical installations.
Preventive and corrective maintenance.
Electrical fault diagnosis.
Electrical distribution boards and protection systems.
Indoor and outdoor lighting.
electricity.footer: Safety, efficiency and energy you can rely on.

network.title: Networking & Connectivity
network.homeDescription: We design and deploy wired and wireless networks, optimising connectivity for businesses, residential communities, private homes and holiday properties through reliable, secure and future-ready solutions.
network.description: We design and implement reliable, secure network infrastructures that deliver optimal performance in both residential and professional environments.
items: Design and installation of LAN networks for homes, offices and businesses.
Structured cabling (Ethernet), patch panels and rack cabinets.
Configuration and optimisation of routers, switches and Wi-Fi access points.
Network segmentation using VLANs and subnets for business environments.
Wireless coverage extension and elimination of dead zones.
Integration of Smart Home, home automation and IoT devices.
Network diagnostics, maintenance and troubleshooting.
Performance optimisation for remote working, CCTV systems, POS terminals and servers.
network.footer: Reliable, secure connectivity built to grow.

process.title: A clear process for achieving the best results.
process.subtitle: Every project follows a defined methodology that allows us to deliver organised, transparent solutions tailored to each client's needs.

step1.title: We Listen
step1.text: We analyse your requirements and answer all your questions before proposing any solution.

step2.title: We Design
step2.text: We select the most suitable technical solution, always focusing on efficiency, safety and quality.

step3.title: We Install
step3.text: We complete every project using quality materials while paying close attention to every detail.

step4.title: We Support
step4.text: Our commitment continues after installation by providing support, maintenance and technical advice whenever you need it.

cta.title: Tell us about your project.
cta.subtitle: We'll assess your requirements and prepare a tailored technical solution, providing professional, transparent and personalised support from the very beginning.

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Discover who we are, how we work and the philosophy that drives us to deliver integrated technical solutions for homes, residential communities and businesses.

philosophy.title: Much more than a technical service provider.
philosophy.p1: At Levante Technical Solutions, we believe that a technical service should offer much more than an installation or repair. It should provide peace of mind, confidence and the assurance that every solution has been designed around each client's real needs.
philosophy.p2: Our goal is to become a single point of contact for homeowners, residential communities, businesses and holiday properties by providing a professional, approachable service capable of integrating different technical disciplines under one working philosophy.
philosophy.p3: We are committed to reliable solutions, high-quality materials, modern technology and personalised support throughout every stage of the project, because we believe trust is built not only through results but also through the way we work.
philosophy.p4: More than carrying out installations, we aim to build long-term relationships based on transparency, commitment and continuous improvement.

process.title: A methodology built on planning, quality and trust.
process.subtitle: Every project follows a structured process that guarantees personalised attention, professional execution and results tailored to each client's needs.

step1.title: We Listen
step1.text: We analyse every requirement to fully understand the project's objectives before proposing any solution.

step2.title: We Assess
step2.text: We evaluate the environment, consider the available options and select the most suitable technical solution.

step3.title: We Design
step3.text: We plan every installation with safety, efficiency and future scalability in mind.

step4.title: We Deliver
step4.text: We complete every installation using quality materials, professional procedures and close attention to every detail.

step5.title: We Support
step5.text: Our commitment continues after project completion through ongoing support, maintenance and technical advice whenever required.

values.title: More than installations. We build trust.
values.subtitle: We strive to become a trusted technical partner by delivering effective, approachable and tailored solutions for every project.

security.title: Safety
security.text: Every installation is carried out according to professional standards, ensuring protection, reliability and best practices.

personal.title: Personalised Service
personal.text: We listen before we act, ensuring every solution is tailored to the client's specific requirements.

tech.title: Modern Technology
tech.text: We rely on equipment and solutions designed to evolve with future needs.

quality.title: Quality
quality.text: We pay attention to every detail to deliver professional, long-lasting results.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.text: Every proposal is explained clearly so our clients always understand the scope of the project.

integral.title: Integrated Solutions
integral.text: Different technical disciplines coordinated through a single point of contact.

scope.title: Solutions tailored to every environment.
scope.subtitle: Our experience enables us to deliver technical projects across a wide range of environments, adapting every solution to the specific needs of each client.

home.title: Homes
home.text: Technical installations for primary residences and second homes.

community.title: Residential Communities
community.text: Maintenance and technical installations for homeowners' associations.

tourist.title: Holiday Properties
tourist.text: Technical solutions specifically designed for holiday rental properties.

business.title: Retail & Commercial
business.text: Technical systems for shops and small to medium-sized businesses.

company.title: Companies
company.text: Technical infrastructures tailored to professional environments.

vision.quote: Our goal is to become the trusted technical partner for homes, residential communities and businesses by delivering professional, approachable and future-ready solutions.

cta.title: Do you have a project in mind?
cta.subtitle: We would be delighted to help you find the technical solution that best suits your needs.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Choose the contact method that suits you best. We'll be happy to help you.
